SQLLite.SQL: SELECT AD.DEBT_SEQ AS "debtSequenceNumber" , AD.DEBT_STATUS AS "debtStatus" , AD.CASEMAN_DEBT AS "caseManDebt" , AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER AS "debtCoNumber" , AD.DEBT_CASE_NUMBER AS "debtCaseNumber" , AD.DEFT_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "deftPartyRoleCode" , AD.DEFT_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "deftCasePartyNo" , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DD.DD_AMOUNT),0) FROM DEBT_DIVIDENDS DD WHERE DD.DD_ALD_SEQ = AD.DEBT_SEQ AND DD.CREATED = 'Y') AS "debtDividendsTotal" , (SELECT NVL(SUM(PAY.AMOUNT), 0) FROM PAYMENTS PAY , ALLOWED_DEBTS AD1 WHERE PAY.ALD_DEBT_SEQ = AD.DEBT_SEQ AND AD1.DEBT_SEQ = PAY.ALD_DEBT_SEQ AND AD1.DEBT_STATUS NOT IN ('DELETED', 'PENDING', 'PAID') AND PAY.PASSTHROUGH = 'Y' AND PAY.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N') AS "debtTotalPassthroughs" , AD.DEBT_AMOUNT_ALLOWED AS "debtAllowedAmount" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND AD.DEBT_STATUS IN ('LIVE', 'SCHEDULE2')

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
